headline: A Look At Extra Space Storage (EXR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Extra Space Storage stock overview Extra Space Storage (EXR) has drawn attention after a steady share price, with the stock recently closing at US$146.95. Investors are comparing this level with the company’s current earnings profile and recent return history. See our latest analysis for Extra Space Storage.
